description: MCP-based live-form filling implementations. Sibling track to extension/ and web-portal/. Three isolated implementations + shared comparison harness.
isolationRule: Each implementation folder owns its package.json and may only import from its own src/ and from mcp-implementations/shared/. No cross-implementation imports.

implementations.name: playwright-mcp
implementations.llmDriver: OpenAI SDK pointed at GitHub Models (https://models.github.ai/inference). Falls back to api.openai.com if OPENAI_API_KEY is set instead of GITHUB_TOKEN.
implementations.browserChannel: chrome (via MCP_BROWSER_CHANNEL env; no bundled chromium download required)

files.src/client.ts: PlaywrightMcpClient — MCP SDK stdio wrapper, tool-call counter
files.src/agent.ts: Agent loop; implements MCPFormFiller; handles <<DONE>>/<<BLOCKED>> tokens
files.tests/smoke.test.ts: Spawns server, lists tools, no LLM call

implementations.name: browser-mcp
implementations.notes: Drives the user's real browser via a Chrome extension bridge. Implements MCPFormFiller stub that returns error='not implemented'.

implementations.name: skyvern-mcp
implementations.notes: Vision-first browser agent. Expects a single high-level goal per run rather than per-field tool calls.

files.live-forms.json: Curated list of live URLs to test against
files.runner.ts: Loads each implementation by name, runs every form N times, writes benchmark-results/mcp-<name>/<form>_<r>.json + benchmark-results/mcp-comparison.json
